themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "And Jael went out to meet Sisera, and said unto him, Turn in, my lord, turn in to me; fear no...". Word-study detail reinforces "תִּירָ֑א: to me fear - to fear; morally to revere; causatively to frighten".
